creator: fjwcash@gmail.com
text:
DansGuardian 2.10 has been released as the new stable version of DansGuardian.  There is not currently a -devel version of DansGuardian.

As such, please mark the www/dansguardian-devel as

IGNORE=         DansGuardian 2.10 has gone stable, use www/dansguardian.  There is not currently a -devel version of DansGuardian

Or however the current method is for marking a port as "not currently useable".

Thanks.
Freddie

Fix: 

See above.
